Plan 35-06 Task B — native CORSMiddleware + .env.example docs

human_actions_pending.action: Run 5 live UAT tests in Foundry VTT v14
human_actions_pending.context: Requires live Foundry + LM Studio + Discord bot. Saved in 35-HUMAN-UAT.md. Tests: attack roll embed, hidden-DC footer, apiKey not in settings panel, webhook-only mode, Sentinel timeout fallback.

decisions.decision: Drop PNACORSMiddleware; use Starlette native allow_private_network=True
decisions.rationale: Starlette 1.0 supports it; subclass incorrectly injected PNA header on non-OPTIONS responses (spec violation)
Starlette exact-string matches allow_origins; globs require allow_origin_regex

decisions.decision: discordWebhookUrl is a Foundry world setting, not a server env var
decisions.rationale: Stored in Foundry database; .env would mislead users into treating it as a server-side secret

next_action: Phase 35 complete. Start Phase 36 (Foundry NPC Pull Import) with /gsd-discuss-phase 36 or /gsd-plan-phase 36.
context_notes: Phase 35 gap-closure plan 35-06 executed. All 6 plans done, 18/18 automated, 7 code review findings fixed, end-user docs written. Only 5 live-Foundry UAT items remain.
